We expect to see it in the first half of 2026, produced at Rivian's factory in Normal, Illinois."},{"url":"https://www.motortrend.com/reviews/2027-rivian-r2-trims-pricing-specs-range","title":"2027 Rivian R2: Pricing, Trims, Range, and Specs Revealed","content":"Mar 12, 2026 — The 2027 Rivian R2 starts at $45000, offers up to 656 hp and 320+ miles of range. $45,000 base price, 609 lb-ft. BASE PRICE $46,495–$59,485 … ...
Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe has been promising a $45,000 base price, and now he’s keeping his word—with mostly and probably qualifiers, as destination charges will boost cost by $1,495 and that Standard entry model is scheduled for late 2027 as a 2028 model, by which time inflation could inflate the price.
Your $46,495 will buy a single, 350-hp, 355-lb-ft motor mounted in back, a 0–60-mph time of 5.9 seconds, and a standard-range battery good for more than 275 miles.
During the first half of 2027, the Standard Long Range RWD will arrive.
Opening at $55,485 and arriving in late 2026 as a 2027 model, the Premium trim comes standard with a dual-motor AWD setup good for 450 hp and 537 lb-ft, slicing more than a second off the RWD model’s 0–60 time at 4.6 seconds.
(Expect the Standard trim AWD model to match these specs.)
For $59,485, this dual-motor AWD setup is tuned for max output: 656 hp and 609 lb-ft of torque that will enable a sprint to 60 mph in 3.6 seconds.
Rivian is stating $2,500 for a one-time purchase of an indefinite subscription or $49.99 per month, undercutting Tesla’s since-discontinued $8,000 buy-in or current $99/month price."},{"url":"https://www.kbb.com/car-news/rivian-announces-r2-trims-pricing/","title":"Rivian Announces R2 Trims, Pricing - Kelley Blue Book","content":"Mar 12, 2026 — The 2027 Rivian R2 will start at $59,485 at launch.

Over time, more affordable options will appear, with a low-end price of $46,495 by the time the lineup is complete.
Standard rear-wheel drive (RWD) — 350 — 275 miles (Rivian-estimated) — $46,495 — Late 2027
Performance — 656 — 330 miles (EPA-estimated) — $59,485 — Spring 2026
The Performance trim, the only one available at launch, will offer 656 hp and standard all-wheel drive (AWD).
Compass Yellow brake calipers.
Reservations are now open for $100, with the R2 set to make a public appearance at SXSW starting March 13.

R2 introduces an array of trims to accommodate varying needs and driving styles, delivering a distinct combination of range, performance and capability — all rooted in Rivian’s adventure DNA. These join Rivian’s established exterior colors, including Midnight, Glacier White, Forest Green, Borealis and Launch Green (available for a limited time with Launch Package), creating a lineup that reflects the environments R2 was designed to move through and explore. *   **Designed for the Road Ahead:**[Rivian Autonomy+](https://rivian.com/autonomy)⁷ ($49.99/month or $2,500/one-time) hardware is built into all R2 trims and service is optional across the lineup (lifetime access to Autonomy+ included⁵ with Launch Package), bringing L2+ hands-free assisted driving to 3.5 million miles of roads across the U.S. and Canada with Universal Hands-Free⁶. The R2 lineup will be on display to the public at [SXSW® 2026](https://rivian.com/events/sxsw) from March 13-18, 2026 at the Rivian Roadhouse. To learn more and reserve R2 visit: [rivian.com/r2](https://rivian.com/r2). *   [R2](https://rivian.com/r2). *   [Your privacy choices](https://rivian.com/newsroom/article/rivian-introduces-r2-lineup).","score":0.8319231,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.caranddriver.com/rivian/r2","title":"2027 Rivian R2 Review, Pricing, and Specs","content":"Now that its **R1S** SUV and **R1T** pickup truck models are showing up on American roads, **Rivian** is turning its sights to a new SUV called R2, which is smaller and more affordable. The R2 is sized similarly to compact gas-powered crossovers such as the **BMW X3** and the **Hyundai Tucson**, but its starting price and electric powertrain put it in the same segment as the **Ford Mustang Mach-E** and the **Tesla Model Y**. Initially, all R2s will ship as either the Premium trim with a 450-horsepower all-wheel-drive setup or the Performance trim with 656 horsepower. The interior of the SUV follows the design theme set by the larger Rivian models and features the same 15.6-inch center infotainment display. The R2 is a new model for Rivian for the 2027 model year. The R2 features an 88-kWh battery pack that the EPA estimates will allow both the Premium and Performance models to drive for up to 330 miles per charge.","score":0.7942736,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.72,"request_id":"a3e897c6-c8cb-45cf-b684-ea81a1f4e244"}
